Expertises.metaTitle: EAI Expertise | Architecture, Engineering, BIM & Project Management in Morocco
Expertises.metaDescription: Discover ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering expertise: architecture, technical studies, BIM consulting, project management, interior design, urban planning, topography and client assistance in Morocco.
Expertises.heroBody: An architectural project does not succeed solely through the strength of its image. It succeeds when creative vision, technical precision, stakeholder coordination and construction mastery move in the same direction.
Expertises.heroSecondary: At ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering, each expertise is conceived as part of a complete system: design with meaning, study with rigor, coordinate with method and deliver with standards.
Expertises.approachTitle: Separate expertises are not enough. A project demands a coordinated vision.
Expertises.approachBody1: In many projects, architecture, engineering, studies, contractors and coordination advance separately. This fragmentation creates delays, inconsistencies, late arbitrations, budget overruns and a loss of quality in execution.
Expertises.approachBody2: EAI adopts a different approach. We consider the project as a living whole where every architectural decision has technical, economic, regulatory and operational consequences.
Expertises.approachBody3: Our role is to create a clear link between the client's vision, site constraints, design requirements, technical studies, consultation documents, stakeholder coordination and the reality of the construction site.
Expertises.approachQuote: The quality of a project is determined as much by the idea as by the precision of its implementation.
Expertises.overviewTitle: A complete chain of expertise, from concept to construction.
Expertises.overviewIntro: Each mission can be independent or integrated into a global approach. Depending on the nature of the project, EAI intervenes in design, consulting, studies, coordination, monitoring or strategic support.

expertiseCards.title: Architecture
expertiseCards.description: Design of residential, commercial, public, hospitality and facility projects, with attention to the site, uses, volumes, light and the identity of the place.

expertiseCards.title: Engineering & technical studies
expertiseCards.description: Analysis, feasibility, calculation, technical coordination, estimation and production of documents to secure the constructability of the project.

expertiseCards.title: BIM Consulting
expertiseCards.description: Modeling, structuring and digital coordination to better anticipate conflicts, organize information and improve collaboration.

expertiseCards.title: Project management & coordination
expertiseCards.description: Monitoring, control, meetings, stakeholder coordination, interface management and support until handover.

expertiseCards.title: Interior design
expertiseCards.description: Design of coherent, elegant and functional interior spaces, integrating materials, furniture, light, circulation and user experience.

expertiseCards.title: Urban planning & development
expertiseCards.description: Planning, organization and enhancement of urban or private spaces according to uses, mobility, environment and quality of life.

expertiseCards.title: Topography
expertiseCards.description: Precise reading of the terrain, surveys, layout, physical constraints and data necessary for studies and design.

expertiseCards.title: Client assistance & strategic consulting
expertiseCards.description: Assisting the client in clarifying the program, making trade-offs, tracking decisions and securing the project.

Expertises.detail01Title: Designing spaces with meaning, precision, and character.
Expertises.detail01Body:
Architecture is the visible starting point of the project, but it is never limited to a form. It organizes uses, circulation, proportions, light, the relationship to the site, the expression of materials and the perception of the place.

EAI designs projects that meet a dual requirement: create a strong architectural identity and guarantee coherence with technical, regulatory, economic and construction realities.

Our approach begins with listening to the program and analyzing the context. It continues with scenario research, volume definition, spatial organization, ambiance choices and the progressive development of a clear, argued and achievable project.
Expertises.detail01Value: For the client, this approach delivers a project that is not just aesthetically pleasing, but truly responds to uses, budget, site and overall ambition.
Expertises.detail01ImageAlt: Contemporary architectural design with plans, volumes and natural light.
Expertises.detail02Title: Transforming an architectural vision into a controlled solution.
Expertises.detail02Body:
An ambitious project requires a solid technical foundation. Studies allow us to verify, secure, dimension and organize the choices that will make the project achievable.

EAI supports clients and project teams in understanding technical constraints, feasibility analysis, estimation, document coordination and preparation of essential decisions.

The goal is not just to produce technical documents. It is to reduce uncertainty, anticipate risks, clarify options and enable the client to move forward with a more reliable vision of their project.
Expertises.detail02Value: This expertise helps avoid unpleasant surprises, late inconsistencies, cost overruns, delays and improvised trade-offs during execution.
detail02Deliverables: Coordination with architects, engineering firms and contractors
Expertises.detail02ImageAlt: Technical studies and construction engineering for architectural project.
Expertises.detail03Title: Digital precision at the service of the real project.
Expertises.detail03Body:
BIM is not just a 3D model. It is a working method that allows organizing information, coordinating stakeholders, detecting conflicts, comparing variants and better anticipating decisions before they become costly on site.

EAI supports projects in using BIM as a tool for precision, coordination and management. The model becomes a dialogue medium between architecture, engineering, contractors, client and future operation.

This approach improves project readability, reduces areas of uncertainty and facilitates information management throughout the building lifecycle.
Expertises.detail03Value: BIM enables the client to better understand their project, visualize choices, anticipate inconsistencies and make faster, better-informed decisions.
Expertises.detail03ImageAlt: BIM digital model used for architectural and technical coordination.
Expertises.detail04Title: Steering the construction site with method, clarity, and standards.
Expertises.detail04Body:
The transition from drawing to construction is one of the most sensitive phases of a project. It is at this moment that decisions become concrete, interfaces multiply and final quality depends on daily coordination.

EAI supports this phase with a rigorous method: progress monitoring, meetings, stakeholder coordination, document control, remark management, blockage anticipation and support until handover.

Our goal is to preserve the original intent while ensuring coherent, realistic and controlled execution.
Expertises.detail04Value: The client benefits from structured monitoring that reduces confusion, improves communication between stakeholders and strengthens delivery quality.
detail04Deliverables: Interface between design, studies and execution
Expertises.detail04ImageAlt: Construction site coordination and project management for construction project.
Expertises.detail05Title: Creating coherent, elegant, and functional interior spaces.
Expertises.detail05Body:
The interior is where architecture becomes daily experience. Every choice influences how one circulates, works, welcomes, rests or interacts with the space.

EAI designs interiors where volumes, materials, light, colors, furniture and details respond to each other with coherence. The goal is to create beautiful, practical, comfortable spaces aligned with the client's identity.

Whether it is a villa, apartment, office, shop, hotel or training space, we seek the balance between aesthetics, use, durability and perceived value.
Expertises.detail05Value: The client obtains a readable, harmonious and enhancing interior, designed to be lived in and not just admired.
detail05Deliverables: Furniture and lighting selection per mission
Expertises.detail05ImageAlt: Premium interior design with materials, light and contemporary furniture.
Expertises.detail06Title: Thinking about space at the territorial scale.
Expertises.detail06Body:
Urban planning demands a broader reading than that of the building. It is about understanding flows, collective uses, public spaces, mobility, infrastructure, density, landscape and the relationship between places.

EAI supports development and planning projects with an approach that connects spatial vision, technical feasibility, environmental integration and quality of life.

Each intervention aims to structure coherent, readable spaces adapted to their context, whether it is a neighborhood, a private site, a public space, a mixed program or a land enhancement project.
Expertises.detail06Value: This expertise helps the client transform a land or site into an organized, readable, valuable project that is better integrated into its environment.
Expertises.detail06ImageAlt: Urban study and development plan for territorial development.
Expertises.detail07Title: Understanding the terrain before transforming the project.
Expertises.detail07Body:
A project always begins with a physical reality: the terrain. Its levels, boundaries, access, slopes, constraints, neighbors and characteristics directly influence design and execution.

Topography establishes a reliable base for designing, laying out, verifying and coordinating. It reduces approximations and gives teams a precise understanding of the site.

EAI integrates this reading of the terrain into the overall project logic to improve study quality and decision security.
Expertises.detail07Value: The client has a clear base to avoid layout errors, misinterpretations of the site and costly adaptations during construction.
detail07Deliverables: Reading of terrain levels and constraints
Expertises.detail07ImageAlt: Topographic survey and technical terrain reading for construction project.
Expertises.detail08Title: Helping the client decide with clarity.
Expertises.detail08Body:
A construction project involves complex decisions: program, budget, deadlines, regulations, technical choices, stakeholder selection, expected quality, risks and priorities.

EAI supports clients in this strategic phase to clarify objectives, structure the approach, compare options and secure important decisions.

Our role is to bring a professional reading of the project, anticipate sensitive points and create a more reliable decision framework before and during realization.
Expertises.detail08Value: The client gains visibility, method and control. They move forward with a better understanding of challenges, risks and priorities.
Expertises.detail08ImageAlt: Client assistance and strategic consulting for architectural project.
Expertises.matrixTitle: Clear documents to move forward with method.
Expertises.matrixIntro: Depending on the assigned mission, EAI produces or coordinates the documents necessary to advance the project with more precision, readability and security.

matrixPhases.objective: Clarify the vision, scope and constraints.
matrixPhases.deliverables: Program, diagnosis, site analysis, constraints, scoping note.
Sketches, plans, volumes, moodboards, images, architectural orientations.
Technical dossiers, estimates, coordinated plans, BIM models, syntheses.

matrixPhases.objective: Prepare decisions and exchanges with contractors.
matrixPhases.deliverables: Consultation documents, bid analysis, recommendations, variants.

matrixPhases.objective: Support the transformation of the project into reality.
matrixPhases.deliverables: Minutes, monitoring, control, coordination, reserves, handover assistance.

Expertises.projectTypesTitle: Expertise adapted to multiple project scales.
Expertises.projectTypesIntro: EAI intervenes on projects of varied nature, with the same demand for coherence between vision, technique and execution.

projectTypes.title: Premium residential
projectTypes.description: Villas, apartments, private residences, residential programs, transformations and property enhancements.

projectTypes.title: Urban planning & development

projectTypes.title: Facilities & institutional projects

Expertises.methodTitle: A method designed to reduce uncertainty.
Expertises.methodBody: Each expertise is driven by a common method: listen, analyze, design, verify, coordinate and support. This continuity avoids breaks between the different phases of the project.

methodSteps.title: Diagnosis
methodSteps.description: Understand the context, site, objectives, constraints and risks.

methodSteps.title: Orientation
methodSteps.description: Define hypotheses, scenarios, priorities and structuring choices.

methodSteps.title: Production
methodSteps.description: Develop plans, studies, models, documents and necessary supports.

methodSteps.title: Coordination
methodSteps.description: Align stakeholders, verify interfaces and clarify decisions.

methodSteps.title: Monitoring
methodSteps.description: Support progress, control deviations and maintain coherence.

methodSteps.title: Delivery
methodSteps.description: Assist the client with handover, reserves and final quality.

Expertises.formationsBody:
Alongside its professional missions, EAI develops practical training to support the skill development of students, technicians, architects, engineers and sector professionals.

These training programs cover design software, BIM, project management, site supervision, interior decoration, architecture and technical tools related to construction.
Expertises.finalTitle1: Your project needs a clear vision,
Expertises.finalBody: Whether your need concerns architectural design, technical study, BIM mission, construction monitoring, interior layout or strategic support, EAI helps you structure the next steps with method.

Hero.description: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering designs, structures, and accompanies projects where architectural beauty meets technical precision. From the initial idea to completion, each space is thought out with rigor, matter, light, and responsibility.
Hero.videoLabel: The video background stays alive: a moving architectural scene behind a clear premium interface.

Blueprint.label: OUR PROCESS
Blueprint.title: Every line becomes matter. Every decision becomes space.
Blueprint.description: Before the construction site, there is precision. Before the form, there is analysis. Our process accompanies each project from understanding the need to technical coordination and final delivery.

Manifesto.label: OUR PHILOSOPHY
Manifesto.subtitle: Architecture as an artistic act and technical responsibility.
lines: We do not only draw buildings.
We give a sustainable form to ideas.
Manifesto.description:
For ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering, every project begins with a clear intention: understand the place, the program, the uses, and the future impact of the space. Our mission is to translate this intention into a precise, controlled, and sensitive architecture, capable of standing the test of time.

We believe that a successful project is never limited to its image. It must be right in its design, coherent in its structure, intelligent in its technical choices, and human in its daily experience.

Services.label: WHO WE ARE
Services.title: An integrated vision of architecture, engineering, and execution.
Services.subtitle: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering supports clients, developers, institutions, businesses, and individuals in the design, study, coordination, and valuation of their projects. Our approach gathers several complementary expertises: architecture, engineering, technical studies, BIM consulting, urban planning, development, interior design, works coordination, client assistance, and professional training.

Projets.metaTitle: EAI Projects | Architecture Portfolio, Interior Design & Urban Planning in Morocco
Projets.metaDescription: Discover ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering projects: residential architecture, interior design, urban planning, hospitality, BIM and technical studies in Morocco.
Projets.heroBody: Every project is a meeting between a site, an ambition, constraints and a way of inhabiting or using space. At ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering, the portfolio is not just a collection of images: it is the trace of a method, a standard and a capacity to transform ideas into coherent places.
Projets.heroSecondary: Residential, commercial, hospitality, urban planning, interior design or technical coordination: our projects are designed to create value, improve usage and anchor every decision in a sustainable vision.
Projets.heroDisciplines: Architecture · Interior design · Urban planning · BIM
Projets.philosophyTitle: A successful project is not judged only by its final image.
Projets.philosophyBody1: An architecture project must be looked at in its entirety. There is the image we see, but also the decisions we don't see: site reading, structure, circulation, light, budget, coordination, technical details, administrative constraints, uses and execution quality.
Projets.philosophyBody2: At EAI, every project is evaluated as a complete system. Form must serve function. Detail must support the whole. Technique must preserve the vision. Space must respond to those who will live in it, cross it, manage or operate it.
Projets.philosophyQuote: The beauty of a project begins in the vision, but is confirmed in the precision of every decision.
Projets.filtersIntro: Our projects cover several scales: from the private villa to the professional space, from the interior concept to the development plan, from the isolated building to the urban vision.
Projets.featuredConcept:
This private villa is conceived as a composition between intimacy, natural light and continuity of spaces. The architecture organizes a fluid relationship between interior and exterior, while preserving the confidentiality of living spaces.

The project explores a sober contemporary writing: readable volumes, mineral materials, controlled openings, generous reception spaces and protected private zones. The goal is to create an elegant, functional and sustainable residence, adapted to the client's lifestyle and the Casablanca urban context.
Projets.featuredImageAlt: Contemporary private villa in Casablanca with sober volumes, natural light and interior-exterior relationship.
Projets.gridTitle: Architectural responses adapted to each context.
Projets.caseStudyLabel: HOW WE TELL A PROJECT STORY
Projets.caseStudyTitle: Every project deserves more than an image.
Projets.caseStudyBody: A professional portfolio must help the visitor understand the logic behind each achievement. That is why detailed project pages should present the context, objectives, constraints, architectural choices, technical interventions, materials, expected results and project lessons.

caseStudySteps.title: Context
caseStudySteps.description: Site, client, use, territory, initial constraints.

caseStudySteps.title: Ambition
caseStudySteps.description: Architectural, functional, economic and symbolic objectives.

caseStudySteps.title: Architectural response
caseStudySteps.description: Volume organization, light, circulation, materials and expression.

caseStudySteps.title: Technical approach
caseStudySteps.description: Structure, coordination, BIM, feasibility, details and constraints.

caseStudySteps.title: Usage experience
caseStudySteps.description: How the project will be lived, used, traversed or operated.

caseStudySteps.title: Value created
caseStudySteps.description: Spatial quality, readability, sustainability, image, comfort and enhancement potential.

Projets.galleryTitle: Architecture is also read in the details.
Projets.galleryBody: Materials, lines, shadows, proportions and transitions give the project its character. Beyond the large form, EAI pays particular attention to the details that build the final experience.

types.title: Residential

Projets.ctaTitle: You have a land, an idea or a space to transform?
Projets.ctaBody:
The portfolio shows a direction. Your project will require a specific response. Our role is to analyze your context, understand your objectives, identify constraints and build an approach adapted to your ambition.

Whether you are a private client planning a villa or interior transformation, a developer creating a residential project, a company creating offices, an institution planning a facility or a project owner needing technical coordination or BIM support, EAI helps you structure the next steps with clarity.
Projets.label: PORTFOLIO
Projets.title: Signature Projects

Apropos.metaTitle: About EAI | ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering in Casablanca
Apropos.metaDescription: Discover ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering, a Moroccan ecosystem dedicated to architecture, engineering, BIM, project management, training and professional events.
Apropos.heroBody: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering is a professional ecosystem dedicated to the design, engineering, coordination and enhancement of architectural projects. Based in Casablanca, the company supports clients, developers, institutions, businesses and individuals in transforming their ideas into coherent, controlled and sustainable projects.
Apropos.heroSecondary: At the crossroads of architecture, engineering, BIM, project management, training and professional events, EAI carries a global vision: to create useful, elegant, technically sound spaces capable of generating value over time.
Apropos.storyTitle: A company born from a conviction: architecture must connect beauty, technique and use.
Apropos.storyBody1: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering was built around a strong idea: a successful project depends not only on an attractive drawing or a purely technical solution. It depends on the ability to connect the client's vision, site constraints, regulatory requirements, economic feasibility, stakeholder coordination and execution quality.
Apropos.storyBody2: In a sector where projects are often fragmented between design, studies, construction, training and communication, EAI defends a more integrated approach. The company brings together several complementary dimensions: design, study, coordinate, support, train and connect sector actors.
Apropos.storyBody3: This vision allows EAI to intervene on various project types: residential, commercial, professional spaces, interior architecture, urban planning, development, technical studies, BIM, training and professional events.
Apropos.storyQuote: Our role is not just to produce plans. Our role is to give clear structure to an ambition.
Apropos.founderBio1: Soukaina Elaouad leads ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering with a transversal vision of the architectural project. Her approach brings together design sensitivity, engineering rigor, construction management methodology and understanding of contemporary issues related to space, city, territory and use.
Apropos.founderBio2: Through EAI, she develops a way of thinking about the project as a complete whole: an idea to clarify, a space to structure, an experience to create, a technique to master and a delivery to secure.
Apropos.founderBio3: Her vision also expresses itself in knowledge transmission and the creation of professional bridges. With EAI Courses and ELAOUAD Events, she contributes to training, connecting and valuing actors in architecture, design, engineering and construction.
Apropos.founderQuote: Architecture is an art that embraces science. It must be sensitive in its vision, rigorous in its method, and responsible in its impact.
Apropos.diffTitle: EAI is not just a design agency. It is a project structure.
Apropos.diffIntro: An architecture project demands more than an idea. It demands a method, trade-offs, reliable documents, clear coordination, technical reading and the ability to support the client in important decisions.

diffBlocks.title: A global reading of the project
diffBlocks.description: We look at the project as a complete system: site, program, budget, uses, technical constraints, deadlines, stakeholders, image, operation and future value.

diffBlocks.title: An alliance between architecture and engineering
diffBlocks.description: Creative vision is always confronted with technical reality. This alliance allows designing more coherent, more reliable and easier to structure projects.

diffBlocks.title: A coordination culture
diffBlocks.description: We place essential importance on information flow between project actors: client, architects, engineers, contractors, suppliers and partners.

diffBlocks.title: Attention to user experience
diffBlocks.description: A space must be beautiful, but also clear, comfortable, functional and adapted to those who will inhabit, use, manage or visit it.

diffBlocks.title: An expanded professional ecosystem
diffBlocks.description: With its training and events, EAI does not limit itself to producing projects. The company also participates in skill development and professional networking in the sector.

Apropos.mvvTitle: A clear guiding line for every decision.
Apropos.missionBody: Our mission is to help clients transform their ideas into coherent architectural, technical and operational projects. We intervene to clarify needs, structure design, coordinate studies, support execution and create durable, useful and value-bearing spaces.
Apropos.visionTitle: Make architecture a lever for quality, culture and development.
Apropos.visionBody: We believe that architecture shapes much more than buildings. It influences uses, behaviors, the image of places, quality of life, organizational performance and how a territory develops.
Apropos.valuesTitle: The principles that guide our work.
Apropos.ecosystemIntro: EAI is organized around several complementary poles. This structure allows acting at different levels of the sector: producing projects, transmitting skills and creating professional encounters.

ecosystemPillars.name: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering
ecosystemPillars.description: The pole dedicated to design, studies, BIM, project management, urban planning, interior architecture and project support.
ecosystemPillars.imageAlt: ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering ecosystem: design, studies and architectural project support in Casablanca.

ecosystemPillars.name: EAI Courses
ecosystemPillars.description: The training platform dedicated to architecture, BIM, 3D software, project management, site supervision and interior design professions.
ecosystemPillars.imageAlt: EAI Courses professional training: BIM, architecture, 3D software and project management in Morocco.

ecosystemPillars.name: ELAOUAD Events
ecosystemPillars.description: The event pole that brings together professionals, brands, institutions, students and decision makers around forums, conferences, exhibitions, workshops and B2B meetings.
ecosystemPillars.imageAlt: ELAOUAD Events professional forums, conferences and B2B networking for architecture and construction in Morocco.

Apropos.cultureTitle: A project is built through collective intelligence.
Apropos.cultureBody1: Behind every project, there are exchanges, trade-offs, documents, meetings, studies, corrections, decisions and shared responsibilities. EAI values a work culture based on collaboration, method and clarity.
Apropos.cultureBody2: Our approach encourages dialogue between disciplines: architecture, engineering, interior design, BIM, urban planning, coordination, training and construction. This collective intelligence allows better anticipating constraints, better understanding challenges and better securing decisions.

cultureBlocks.title: Listening
cultureBlocks.description: Understand the real need before proposing a formal response.

cultureBlocks.title: Method
cultureBlocks.description: Organize phases, documents, decisions and responsibilities.

cultureBlocks.title: Coordination
cultureBlocks.description: Connect stakeholders to reduce inconsistencies and streamline progress.

cultureBlocks.title: Continuous improvement
cultureBlocks.description: Learn from every project, every training and every professional encounter.

designPrinciples.title: Material
designPrinciples.description: Materials give the project its character, durability and presence. They must be chosen for their aesthetics, resistance, coherence and relationship to context.

designPrinciples.title: Light
designPrinciples.description: Light reveals volumes, creates ambiances, improves comfort and transforms the perception of space. It is at the heart of architectural quality.

designPrinciples.title: Use
designPrinciples.description: A space must respond to real practices. Circulation, ergonomics, comfort, flexibility, reception and readability are essential to project success.

designPrinciples.title: Precision
designPrinciples.description: Precision protects the vision. Plans, studies, details, coordination, monitoring and communication must reduce uncertainty and strengthen final quality.

trustPoints.title: A comprehensive approach
trustPoints.description: EAI intervenes on several key project stages: design, studies, coordination, monitoring, training and transmission.

trustPoints.title: Understanding client challenges
trustPoints.description: We know that a project involves time, budget, risks, decisions and responsibility. Our role is to bring clarity and method.

trustPoints.title: A technical culture
trustPoints.description: The aesthetic dimension is always supported by a technical, economic, regulatory and operational reading.

trustPoints.title: A delivery-oriented vision
trustPoints.description: Quality is not limited to concept. It must be found in documents, coordination and execution.

trustPoints.title: A presence in the professional ecosystem
trustPoints.description: Through its training and events, EAI contributes to skill development, exchanges and sector visibility.

trustPoints.title: A sustainable ambition
trustPoints.description: We seek to design spaces capable of lasting, evolving and remaining useful over time.

Apropos.timelineTitle: A trajectory focused on building an ecosystem.

timelineSteps.title: Foundation of the vision
timelineSteps.description: Birth of an approach that connects architecture, engineering, project methodology and professional responsibility.

timelineSteps.title: Expertise development

timelineSteps.title: Future vision
timelineSteps.description: Strengthening an integrated model capable of designing, training, connecting and supporting projects at a larger scale.

Apropos.ctaTitle1: Looking for more than a provider?
Apropos.ctaBody: Whether your project is architectural, technical, urban, interior, event-related or educational, EAI supports you with a structured, sensitive and demanding approach.
Apropos.label: BEHIND THE TRANSFORMATION
Apropos.subtitle: Civil Engineer · Construction Project Manager · Doctoral Researcher in Architecture
Apropos.quote: Architecture is an art that embraces science. It must be sensitive in its vision, rigorous in its method, and responsible in its impact.
Apropos.description:
Soukaina Elaouad leads ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering with a strong conviction: an architectural project can only succeed when it unites imagination, technical precision, rigorous management, and deep understanding of the context.

Her background in civil engineering, construction project management, and architectural research allows her to approach every mission with a transversal vision. For her, building does not only mean producing a form, but designing a framework of life, anticipating uses, respecting the territory, and sustainably integrating economic, social, cultural, and environmental constraints.

Contact.heroTitle1: Every project starts with a clear conversation.
Contact.heroBody: Do you have an idea, a plot of land, a space to transform, a project to structure or a collaboration to propose? ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering supports you from the first decisions to clarify possibilities, anticipate constraints and build an adapted approach.
Contact.heroSecondary: Architecture, engineering, BIM, interior design, project management, training or professional events: choose the right topic, share your need and our team will guide you to the most suitable response.
Contact.optionsTitle: Choose the channel best suited to your request.
Contact.optionsIntro: Depending on the nature of your need, you can contact us directly or fill out the detailed form to send us essential information about your project.
Contact.optionProjectText: Present your project, its context, location, current stage and the objectives you wish to achieve.
Contact.optionPhoneText: For a quick contact or urgent request, reach our team by phone.
Contact.optionWhatsAppText: To share initial information, a location, images or request quick guidance, contact us via WhatsApp.
Contact.optionEmailText: To send a file, an institutional request, a partnership proposal or a detailed inquiry.
Contact.formIntro: The clearer your request, the more effectively our team can guide you. You can provide only the information available today; details will be clarified during the first exchange.
Contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Describe your project, your need, your objective, the location, available documents and any useful information.
Contact.formConsent: I agree to be contacted by ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering regarding my request.
Contact.formSuccess: Your request has been sent successfully. Our team will contact you soon to clarify your need and guide you to the most suitable solution.
Contact.formError: An error occurred during submission. Please try again or contact us directly by email at contact@eai-construction.com.
Contact.formConsentRequired: You must agree to be contacted.
Contact.prepareTitle: Information that helps us better understand your project.
Contact.prepareIntro: You don't need a complete file to contact us. However, certain elements can speed up the analysis and make the first exchange more effective.

prepareItems.title: Location
prepareItems.description: Address, city, neighborhood, land, existing building or intervention area.

prepareItems.title: Project type
prepareItems.description: Villa, apartment, office, retail, hotel, public space, training, event, technical study or other.

prepareItems.title: Main objective
prepareItems.description: Build, renovate, fit out, study, coordinate, train, exhibit, participate or develop a collaboration.

prepareItems.title: Available documents
prepareItems.description: Plans, photos, surveys, ownership certificate, program, specifications, inspiration images or existing studies.

prepareItems.title: Indicative budget
prepareItems.description: An approximate envelope helps prioritize and avoid unrealistic proposals.

prepareItems.title: Desired timeline
prepareItems.description: Start date, urgency, provisional schedule, administrative deadline or delivery objective.

routingPanels.title: You have an architectural project
routingPanels.description: We can support you in design, study, plans, procedures, coordination and general project direction.

routingPanels.title: You want to transform an interior
routingPanels.description: We can help you rethink volumes, circulation, materials, light, furniture, atmospheres and user experience.

routingPanels.title: You are looking for training
routingPanels.description: For BIM, Revit, AutoCAD, SketchUp, interior design, project management or construction supervision training, you can access the EAI Courses platform or request guidance.

routingPanels.title: You want to participate in an event
routingPanels.description: For forums, conferences, exhibitions, workshops, booths, sponsorship or partnerships, you can access the ELAOUAD Events platform or contact us directly.

routingPanels.title: You are a company, brand or partner
routingPanels.description: For professional collaboration, B2B request, partnership proposal or intervention, share your objective and contact details.

Contact.afterTitle: A structured contact process, no improvisation.

afterSteps.title: Reception
afterSteps.description: Your request is received with the information submitted via the form.

afterSteps.title: Qualification
afterSteps.description: The team identifies the type of need, urgency level, missing information and the right contact person.

afterSteps.title: First exchange
afterSteps.description: We contact you to clarify the context, objectives, constraints, available documents and possible next steps.

afterSteps.title: Guidance
afterSteps.description: Depending on the request, we may propose a consultation, a mission, a referral to EAI Courses, ELAOUAD Events or a request for additional documents.

faqItems.question: Can I contact EAI even if my project is still at the idea stage?
faqItems.answer: Yes. An initial idea can already be discussed. The purpose of the first exchange is precisely to clarify the context, possibilities, constraints and next steps.

faqItems.question: What documents should I send?
faqItems.answer: You can send available documents: plans, photos, location, program, inspiration images, existing file or specifications. If you have no documents, simply describe your need.

faqItems.question: Does EAI only operate in Casablanca?
faqItems.answer: EAI is based in Casablanca, but requests may concern other cities depending on the nature of the project, the mission and intervention conditions.

faqItems.question: Can I request training through this page?
faqItems.answer: Yes. You can select "EAI Courses training" in the form or directly access the EAI Courses platform to browse available programs.

faqItems.question: Can I request a partnership or booth for an event?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Requests related to events, exhibitions, conferences, sponsorship or partnerships can be sent via the form or viewed on the ELAOUAD Events platform.

faqItems.question: Does the form replace a consultation?
faqItems.answer: No. The form allows you to submit initial information. A consultation or mission may then be proposed based on the nature of the request.

Contact.finalTitle: Your project deserves a clear first decision.
Contact.finalBody: Write to us with the information you have today. We will help you clarify the need, identify priorities and define the best way forward.

Events.metaTitle: EAI Events | Architecture, Construction, Design & BIM Forums in Morocco
Events.metaDescription: Discover ELAOUAD Events: forums, conferences, exhibitions and workshops around architecture, interior design, construction, BIM, sustainability and innovation in Morocco.
Events.heroBody: ELAOUAD Events is the event branch of ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering. It designs and organizes forums, conferences, exhibitions and professional meetings around architecture, interior design, construction, BIM, sustainability and innovation.
Events.heroSecondary: Each event is designed as a platform for visibility, knowledge sharing and networking between professionals, institutions, brands, manufacturers, architects, engineers, developers, students and decision makers.
Events.missionTitle: A platform where professionals meet, learn and build the future of the sector.
Events.missionBody1: ELAOUAD Events creates spaces for dialogue and visibility for the professions of architecture, engineering, interior design and construction. The goal is not just to organize events, but to build platforms where ideas circulate, expertise is shared and professional opportunities are created.
Events.missionBody2: Through its forums, conferences and workshops, ELAOUAD Events brings together complementary profiles: architects, designers, engineers, developers, manufacturers, suppliers, institutions, students, trainers, researchers and decision makers.
Events.missionBody3: Each meeting is designed to value innovation, strengthen B2B connections, present market trends and contribute to the skill development of sector actors.
Events.missionQuote: A successful event is not just about gathering people. It creates useful connections, lasting ideas and concrete opportunities.
Events.featuredTitle: The next professional meetings organized by ELAOUAD Events.

featuredEvents.title: International Construction Forum 2026
featuredEvents.description: The International Construction Forum 2026 is designed as a strategic meeting for building, architecture, engineering, real estate development, materials, infrastructure and construction technology actors.
featuredEvents.audience: Architects, engineers, developers, institutions, manufacturers, suppliers, investors, public and private decision makers.

featuredEvents.title: International Interior Decoration Forum 2026
featuredEvents.description: The International Interior Decoration Forum 2026 highlights the professions, brands, materials, solutions and innovations related to interior design, layout, decoration, furniture, coatings, lighting, home automation and professional spaces.
featuredEvents.audience: Interior architects, designers, decorators, brands, suppliers, manufacturers, artisans, students, specifiers, developers and passionate individuals.
featuredEvents.alt: International Interior Decoration Forum 2026 in Casablanca

Events.formatsTitle: Formats designed to inform, exhibit, train and connect.

formats.title: Professional forums
formats.description: Events structured around a sector or major theme, bringing together exhibitors, visitors, experts, institutions and decision makers.

formats.title: Specialized conferences
formats.description: Meetings dedicated to technical, environmental and strategic issues: BIM, sustainable construction, decarbonization, net zero buildings, innovation and digitalization.

formats.title: Exhibitions & booths
formats.description: Visibility spaces for brands, manufacturers, suppliers, engineering firms, artisans and companies who want to present their solutions to a qualified audience.

formats.title: Practical workshops
formats.description: Workshops led by professionals to transmit concrete methods: coatings, home automation, lighting, layout, interior design, materials, construction and design.

formats.title: B2B networking
formats.description: Meeting moments designed to create partnerships, generate leads, strengthen visibility and connect the right market actors.

formats.title: Training & knowledge sharing
formats.description: Events that extend EAI's educational mission by allowing professionals and students to learn from sector experts.

Events.ecosystemTitle: A program between design, construction, sustainability and innovation.

ecosystemEvents.title: International Construction Forum 2026
ecosystemEvents.description: A meeting dedicated to solutions, technologies and strategies transforming construction: artificial intelligence, sustainable infrastructure, project management, materials, safety, control, innovation and BTP sector development.

ecosystemEvents.description: An event dedicated to interior decoration, materials, coatings, layout, furniture, lighting, home automation and layout solutions.

Events.participateTitle: Qualified visibility among the actors who decide, specify and build.
Events.participateIntro: ELAOUAD events are designed as value platforms for several profiles: exhibitors, sponsors, partners, professional visitors, students, trainers and institutions.

audiences.title: For exhibitors
audiences.description: Present your products, services, materials, solutions or innovations to a targeted audience. Strengthen your visibility, generate qualified contacts and associate your brand with a specialized professional event.

audiences.title: For professionals
audiences.description: Discover trends, meet experts, expand your network, participate in conferences and identify new collaboration opportunities.

audiences.title: For institutions & partners
audiences.description: Support the structuring of a professional ecosystem around architecture, construction, design, training and innovation.

audiences.title: For students & young talents
audiences.description: Learn from professionals, attend workshops, discover sector careers and create the first useful connections for your career.

Events.fidiTitle: An immersion into the world of interior design.
Events.fidiBody: The International Interior Decoration Forum is designed as a complete experience around layout and space creation. It brings together complementary universes: wall coatings, floor coverings, home automation, craftsmanship, carpentry, kitchens, furniture, lighting, professional spaces and upholstery.
Events.sustainabilityTitle: Conferences to think about tomorrow's technical challenges.
Events.sustainabilityBody: EAI events also address topics that are deeply transforming the sector: decarbonization, sustainable construction, net zero energy buildings, BIM, digitalization, responsible materials, energy efficiency and project data management.

sustainabilityTopics.title: Construction decarbonization
sustainabilityTopics.description: Carbon footprint reduction, materials, waste, environmental strategy and reporting.

sustainabilityTopics.title: Sustainable construction
sustainabilityTopics.description: Building lifecycle, circular economy, reuse, recycling, resources, energy and environmental impact.

sustainabilityTopics.title: Net Zero Energy Buildings
sustainabilityTopics.description: High-performance buildings, energy needs reduction, renewable integration and carbon neutrality.

sustainabilityTopics.title: BIM & digital construction
sustainabilityTopics.description: Digital modeling, coordination, conflict detection, project data, collaboration and construction optimization.

journeySteps.title: Participate
journeySteps.description: Attend conferences, visit booths, participate in workshops and create qualified connections.

journeySteps.title: Extend
journeySteps.description: Transform meetings into collaborations, commercial opportunities, learning or partnerships.

Formations.metaTitle: EAI Training | Architecture, BIM, Construction & Interior Design in Morocco
Formations.metaDescription: Discover ELAOUAD Courses: professional training in architecture, BIM, 3D software, project management, site supervision and interior design in Morocco.
Formations.heroTitle: Train the professionals capable of designing, managing, and building tomorrow.
Formations.heroBody: ELAOUAD Courses is the professional training platform of ELAOUAD Architecture & Engineering. It offers practical programs in architecture, BIM, design software, project management, site supervision and interior design.
Formations.heroSecondary: Training programs designed by industry professionals to bridge theory and practice and develop directly applicable construction skills.
Formations.missionTitle: Transmit field expertise to those who build the future.
Formations.missionBody1: ELAOUAD Courses creates a bridge between the professional world and training. Each program is designed from the real experience of our teams on architecture, engineering, BIM and construction coordination projects.
Formations.missionBody2: Our approach is resolutely practical. Learners work on concrete cases, real project studies, digital models and professional situations they will encounter in their careers.
Formations.missionBody3: Whether you are a student, technician, architect, engineer or career changer, our training gives you the tools, methods and confidence needed to thrive in the construction sector.
Formations.missionQuote: Training is the most powerful investment to transform a career in construction.
Formations.categoriesTitle: Programs adapted to every professional ambition.
Formations.categoriesIntro: Our training covers all the skills needed to design, coordinate and deliver construction projects. Each category offers multiple levels and specializations.

categories.title: Architecture & Project Management
categories.description: From architectural design to site management: BIM, TILOS, construction supervision, structural calculations, utilities, urban planning and land law.

categories.title: Software & 3D Design
categories.description: Master professional design tools: AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp Pro, 3ds Max, Archicad, Tekla, Covadis, Mensura and MS Project.

categories.title: Decoration & Interior Design
categories.description: 3D interior decoration, space optimization, well-being, materials, ambiances and introduction to decoration for professionals and individuals.

categories.title: Construction & Engineering
categories.description: Construction techniques, materials, standards, safety, quality control, estimation and technical coordination for construction professionals.

Formations.programsTitle: The most requested training by professionals.

featuredPrograms.title: BIM Management — From model to coordination
featuredPrograms.description: Master BIM modeling, cross-discipline coordination, conflict detection and project data management for more efficient construction.
featuredPrograms.alt: BIM Management training with digital model

featuredPrograms.title: Revit Architecture — Complete project design
featuredPrograms.description: Learn to design a complete architectural project with Revit: plans, elevations, sections, schedules, renderings and technical documentation.
featuredPrograms.alt: Revit Architecture training for project design

featuredPrograms.title: Site Supervision — Steering execution
featuredPrograms.description: Develop essential skills to manage a construction site: planning, contractor coordination, quality monitoring, safety and handover.
featuredPrograms.alt: Site supervision and execution management training

featuredPrograms.title: 3D Interior Design — Designing spaces
featuredPrograms.description: Create photorealistic 3D interiors: layout, materials, lighting, furniture and client presentation for residential and commercial projects.

featuredPrograms.title: TILOS — Linear project planning
featuredPrograms.description: Master TILOS for linear project planning: roads, utilities, infrastructure, pipelines and public works with time-distance visualization.
featuredPrograms.alt: TILOS training for linear project planning

featuredPrograms.title: AutoCAD — Technical drawing fundamentals
featuredPrograms.description: Learn the basics of technical drawing with AutoCAD: essential commands, layers, annotations, printing and professional plan production.

Formations.methodTitle: Learn by doing, with real cases and expert guidance.
Formations.methodBody: Each EAI training is built around a clear progression: from fundamentals to advanced practice, with concrete projects, guided exercises and personalized support.

methodSteps.title: Assessment & orientation
methodSteps.description: Level evaluation, objective identification and recommendation of the most suitable path for the learner's profile and ambition.

methodSteps.title: Theoretical fundamentals
methodSteps.description: Acquisition of essential basics: concepts, terminology, standards, tools and methodologies specific to each training domain.

methodSteps.title: Guided practice
methodSteps.description: Progressive exercises on concrete cases: models, plans, 3D models, schedules and real project studies drawn from EAI experience.

methodSteps.title: Integration project
methodSteps.description: Completion of a comprehensive project that mobilizes all acquired skills, with personalized feedback and detailed correction.

methodSteps.title: Certification & follow-up
methodSteps.description: Final assessment, EAI certificate delivery and post-training support to facilitate skill application in a professional context.

testimonials.quote: The BIM training allowed me to move from theoretical understanding to real mastery of coordination. The practical cases drawn from EAI projects make all the difference.
testimonials.name: Youssef A.

testimonials.quote: I took the Revit training alongside my job. The flexibility and quality of exercises allowed me to progress quickly and be operational on my projects.
testimonials.name: Fatima Z.

testimonials.quote: The site supervision training gave me the tools I had been looking for for years. The method is clear, the trainers are active professionals and the cases are real.
testimonials.name: Karim B.

testimonials.quote: Thanks to the 3D decoration training, I was able to launch my interior design business. The skills acquired are directly applicable and clients are impressed by the rendering quality.
testimonials.name: Amina M.

Formations.platformBody: The EAI Courses platform centralizes all our training: detailed catalogs, programs, schedules, registrations, online course access, educational resources and progress tracking.
Formations.instructorsTitle: Active professionals who share their experience.
Formations.instructorsBody: Every EAI trainer is an active professional in their field. Architecture, engineering, BIM, construction or interior design: they bring updated field expertise and real project cases.

instructors.name: Soukaina Elaouad
instructors.title: Founder & Director
instructors.bio: Civil engineer, construction project manager and doctoral researcher in architecture. She leads EAI and transmits her integrated vision of architecture and engineering.

instructors.name: Senior BIM Expert
instructors.title: BIM Coordinator
instructors.bio: Over 10 years of experience in BIM modeling and complex project coordination. Specialist in Revit, Navisworks and BIM strategy.

instructors.name: Construction Expert
instructors.title: Senior Site Manager
instructors.bio: 20 years of field experience managing residential, commercial and infrastructure projects. Expert in TILOS planning and construction management.

Formations.certificationTitle: A certificate that attests to your skills.
Formations.certificationBody: Upon completion of each training, learners who meet the evaluation criteria receive an EAI certificate. This document attests to acquired skills and can be verified online by employers and institutions.
certificationBenefits: Online verifiable certificate with unique identifier
Valuable on CV, LinkedIn and professional portfolios
Proof of practical and operational skills
Access to the EAI alumni community

faqs.question: Who can take EAI training?
faqs.answer: Our training is open to students, technicians, architects, engineers, site managers, interior designers and anyone looking to develop skills in the construction sector. No prerequisites are required for introductory courses.

faqs.question: Are training courses available online?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most of our training is available in online, in-person or hybrid formats. Each training page specifies the available modalities.

faqs.question: What is the average duration of a training course?
faqs.answer: Duration varies by program. Introductory training typically lasts 2 to 5 days, while advanced programs may extend over several weeks with a schedule adapted to working professionals.

faqs.question: Do you receive a certificate at the end?
faqs.answer: Yes. An EAI certificate is issued to learners who meet the training evaluation criteria. This certificate is verifiable online and can be shared on professional platforms.

faqs.question: How do I register for a training course?
faqs.answer: You can register directly on the EAI Courses platform by selecting your desired training. You can also contact us for personalized guidance based on your profile and objectives.

faqs.question: Do you offer training for companies?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer custom training for companies, engineering firms, architecture firms and developers. Contact us to discuss your needs and receive a personalized quote.

Formations.ctaTitle: Ready to invest in your skills?
Formations.ctaBody: Each EAI training is designed to give you the tools, methods and confidence needed to thrive in the construction sector. Explore the catalog, choose your path and start building your professional future.
Formations.label: ELAOUAD COURSES
Formations.title: Train the professionals capable of designing, managing, and building tomorrow.
Formations.description: ELAOUAD Courses offers practical training in the areas of architecture, construction, BIM, 3D software, project management, site supervision, and interior design. The programs are designed to bring theory closer to the field and help learners develop directly exploitable skills.
Formations.pillar1Desc: BIM, TILOS, construction project management, site supervision, structural calculations, utilities, urbanism, land law.
Formations.pillar2Desc: AutoCAD, Revit, SketchUp Pro, 3ds Max, Archicad, Tekla, Covadis, Mensura, MS Project.
Formations.pillar3Desc: 3D interior decoration, space optimization, well-being, introduction to decoration.
Formations.ctaRegisterDesc: Select your theme and plan your professional path with our experts.

CallToAction.label: START A COLLABORATION
headlineLines: Your project deserves a clear vision

Cinematic.label: Process
Cinematic.title: From vision to matter
Cinematic.step1Desc: Read the site, clarify uses and place the first lines.
Cinematic.step2Desc: Align architecture, BIM, structure and engineering before construction.
Cinematic.step3Desc: Transform intent into a durable, precise and inhabited place.
